'''竏單h-p-ng''' ('''shadhapang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nebulise|nebulise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nebulise|nebulise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏單h-p-ng
|-
! Lemma
| shadhapang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhapang|thidhapang]] || [[word:jidhapang|jidhapang]] || [[word:shidhapang|shidhapang]] || [[word:kidhapang|kidhapang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhapang|thuthudhapang]] || [[word:jujudhapang|jujudhapang]] || [[word:shushudhapang|shushudhapang]] || [[word:kukudhapang|kukudhapang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhapang|thudhapang]] || [[word:judhapang|judhapang]] || [[word:shudhapang|shudhapang]] || [[word:kudhapang|kudhapang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhapang|thudhapang]] || [[word:judhapang|judhapang]] || [[word:shudhapang|shudhapang]] || [[word:kudhapang|kudhapang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhapang|thedhapang]] || [[word:jedhapang|jedhapang]] || [[word:shedhapang|shedhapang]] || [[word:kedhapang|kedhapang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhapang|thothodhapang]] || [[word:jojodhapang|jojodhapang]] || [[word:shoshodhapang|shoshodhapang]] || [[word:kokodhapang|kokodhapang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhapang|thodhapang]] || [[word:jodhapang|jodhapang]] || [[word:shodhapang|shodhapang]] || [[word:kodhapang|kodhapang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhapang|thodhapang]] || [[word:jodhapang|jodhapang]] || [[word:shodhapang|shodhapang]] || [[word:kodhapang|kodhapang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦdhapang|thﾃｦdhapang]] || [[word:jﾃｦdhapang|jﾃｦdhapang]] || [[word:shﾃｦdhapang|shﾃｦdhapang]] || [[word:kﾃｦdhapang|kﾃｦdhapang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhapang|thathadhapang]] || [[word:jajadhapang|jajadhapang]] || [[word:shashadhapang|shashadhapang]] || [[word:kakadhapang|kakadhapang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhapang|thadhapang]] || [[word:jadhapang|jadhapang]] || [[word:shadhapang|shadhapang]] || [[word:kadhapang|kadhapang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhapang|thadhapang]] || [[word:jadhapang|jadhapang]] || [[word:shadhapang|shadhapang]] || [[word:kadhapang|kadhapang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhapang|shadhapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhapang|goshadhapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhapang|gokishadhapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhapangnﾃｼ|shadhapangnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhapangnknﾃｼ|goshadhapangnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhapangnﾃｼ|gokishadhapangnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhapangshﾃｫ|shadhapangshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhapangnkshﾃｫ|goshadhapangnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhapangshﾃｫ|gokishadhapangshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhapangro|shadhapangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhapangnkro|goshadhapangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhapangro|gokishadhapangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhapangmu|shadhapangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhapangnkmu|goshadhapangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhapangmu|gokishadhapangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhapangsher|shadhapangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhapangnksher|goshadhapangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhapangsher|gokishadhapangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhapang|shadhapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhapangnkng|goshadhapangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhapang|gokishadhapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhapangya|shadhapangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhapangnkya|goshadhapangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhapangya|gokishadhapangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhapangyam|shadhapangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhapangnkyam|goshadhapangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhapangyam|gokishadhapangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhapangnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shadhapangnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhapangnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshadhapangnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhapangnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishadhapangnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhapangnﾃｼro|shadhapangnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhapangnknﾃｼro|goshadhapangnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhapangnﾃｼro|gokishadhapangnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhapangnﾃｼmu|shadhapangnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhapangnknﾃｼmu|goshadhapangnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhapangnﾃｼmu|gokishadhapangnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhapangshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shadhapangshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhapangnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshadhapangnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhapangshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishadhapangshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhapangshﾃｫro|shadhapangshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhapangnkshﾃｫro|goshadhapangnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhapangshﾃｫro|gokishadhapangshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhapangshﾃｫmu|shadhapangshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhapangnkshﾃｫmu|goshadhapangnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhapangshﾃｫmu|gokishadhapangshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhapangronﾃｼ|shadhapangronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhapangnkronﾃｼ|goshadhapangnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhapangronﾃｼ|gokishadhapangronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhapangroshﾃｫ|shadhapangroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhapangnkroshﾃｫ|goshadhapangnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhapangroshﾃｫ|gokishadhapangroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhapangromu|shadhapangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhapangnkromu|goshadhapangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhapangromu|gokishadhapangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhapangmunﾃｼ|shadhapangmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhapangnkmunﾃｼ|goshadhapangnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhapangmunﾃｼ|gokishadhapangmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhapangmushﾃｫ|shadhapangmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhapangnkmushﾃｫ|goshadhapangnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhapangmushﾃｫ|gokishadhapangmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhapangmuro|shadhapangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhapangnkmuro|goshadhapangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhapangmuro|gokishadhapangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
